---
title: "Blog"
description: "Writing on psychology, philosophy, political theory, and technology."
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
page-layout: full
code-tools: false
---

::: cli-prompt
<span class="text-terminal-primary">cole@press:~$</span> <code class="text-glow">ls -la ~/blog/</code>
:::

Posts will appear here as they're published. Subscribe via the [newsletter](/) to get notified.
